title: Prepared cards and deterministic attention inbox
user_task: As Eva, inspect prepared Codex session cards, choose the highest-priority attention item, and expand only bounded summary-leaf evidence before deciding the next safe action.
expected_public_safe_evidence: stale partial unknown and low-confidence reason codes
proof_boundary: Dry-run fixture and MCP scenario for deterministic prepared-card and attention-inbox materialization over public-safe summary leaves. It proves advisory local prepared Codex state for OpenClaw/Eva only; it does not prove watcher persistence, hook capture, model compaction, true Codex compaction-summary capture, live control, GUI mutation, unattended autonomy, release readiness, or 1.2 GA readiness.
next_action: Implement persisted watcher observations and execute=false attention queue behavior in #411 after #410 lands.
